title: Everyone baby
description: A datapack that makes all mobs become a baby, even those that can't in the basegame. Use this datapack if you want the cutest experience :D.
body:
# Everyone baby
_Just a simple datapack that makes every mob become a baby, even those that can't be a baby in the base game._

## Limitations ⚠️
Because some mobs do not have the baby tag in the base game the age is set to being a baby and forced that way or the mob is just made smaller and faster. To enhance the baby look, certain mobs (including the player) have enlarged heads.
